# grannyshot-ui

> Tailwind CSS + Ark UI based React design system with 37 components.

## Docs

- [Components](https://ui.grannyshot.co.kr/components/button): Full component documentation
- [GitHub](https://github.com/grannyshot/ui): Source code
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@grannyshot/ui): Package

## Install

```
npm install @grannyshot/ui
```

## Setup

```tsx
import '@grannyshot/ui/styles.css'
import { Button } from '@grannyshot/ui'
```

## Components (37)

### General
- Button: variant(primary|secondary|outline|ghost|danger), size(sm|md|lg)
- Badge: variant(success|warning|error|info|neutral), size(sm|md)
- Avatar: size(sm|md|lg|xl), name, src
- Separator: orientation(horizontal|vertical)
- Skeleton: variant(text|circular|rectangular)
- EmptyState: icon, title, description, actions
- Alert: variant(info|success|warning|error), title, icon

### Form
- Input: size(sm|md|lg), state(default|error|success)
- Textarea: size(sm|md|lg), state, resize
- Label: required, disabled
- Field: label, hint, error, required (form field wrapper)
- Checkbox: size(sm|md|lg), label
- Switch: size(sm|md|lg), label
- RadioGroup: compound(Root+Item), size(sm|md|lg), orientation
- Select: size(sm|md|lg), collection(createListCollection)
- Combobox: size(sm|md|lg), collection, placeholder
- NumberInput: size(sm|md|lg), min, max, step
- PinInput: size(sm|md|lg), length, mask
- Slider: size(sm|md|lg), label, showValue
- DatePicker: calendar date selection
- FileUpload: drag-and-drop, maxFiles
- TagsInput: size(sm|md|lg), tag add/remove

### Layout
- Card: padding(sm|md|lg), hoverable
- Table: compound(Root,Header,HeaderCell,Body,Row,Cell,Caption)
- Tabs: compound(Root,List,Trigger,Content,Indicator), variant(line|pill)
- Accordion: compound(Root,Item,ItemTrigger,ItemContent)
- Steps: compound(Root,List,Item,Content,CompletedContent)

### Overlay
- Dialog: compound, size(sm|md|lg)
- Drawer: compound, placement(left|right)
- Popover: compound with Arrow
- Tooltip: content, openDelay, closeDelay
- Menu: compound with ItemGroup, Separator

### Feedback
- Toast: toast.success/error/warning/info() + ToastProvider
- Progress: size(sm|md|lg), label, showValue

### Navigation
- Pagination: count, pageSize, size(sm|md)
- Breadcrumb: compound(Root,Item,Link,Separator)
- ToggleGroup: compound(Root,Item), size(sm|md|lg), multiple

## Theme

- Light / Dark
- Dark mode: add `class="dark"` to `<html>` element
- CSS variables: --gs-* prefix
- Compatible with next-themes or manual toggle

## Import Paths

- `@grannyshot/ui` — all exports
- `@grannyshot/ui/react` — React components only
- `@grannyshot/ui/styles` — recipe functions (tv)
- `@grannyshot/ui/tokens` — design token functions
- `@grannyshot/ui/utils` — cn utility
- `@grannyshot/ui/styles.css` — CSS (Tailwind projects or standalone)
- `@grannyshot/ui/styles-no-preflight.css` — CSS without reset (other frameworks)
